title: Trump won big with the White working-class. Now they’re souring on him.
description: In a striking shift, White voters without college degrees that voted to reelect Trump by a huge margin are now net-negative on his job approval.

title: U.S. and Iran trade fresh strikes as Trump holds to maximum demands
description: The strikes on an Iranian launch site and a U.S. base in the region followed a warning from Trump that if Iran didn’t start acceding to demands, the U.S. would “finish them off.”

title: U.S. conducts another strike against Iran
description: U.S. forces carried out new defensive strikes on Iran on Wednesday as President Trump insisted November's midterm elections won't make him rush to make a deal to end the Iran war.

title: An Ohio pastor-turned-lawmaker backs a Charlie Kirk American Heritage Act for schools
description: The bill says it would permit the teaching of the positive impact of Judeo-Christian values in U.S. history. Opponents say it offers a skewed view of history.

title: These swing voters are adding high gas prices into their political calculations
description: As part of NPR's Swing Shift project checking in with swing voters, these Americans are split on who is to blame for high gas prices but they all agree it has an impact on their personal finances.

title: Trump pledged to house 6,000 homeless vets. His budget funds zero
description: Veteran groups hoped a Trump executive order would supercharge housing for homeless vets. That hasn't happened, and veterans' advocates want to know why.

title: After Texas Senate primaries, Democrats are fired up about their chances in the fall
description: Democrats see an opportunity to flip several GOP-held Senate seats this fall, including Texas, where the matchup was officially set this week.

title: Democrats are hopeful they can retake the Senate. Do they have a shot?
description: Democrats see an opportunity in Texas to retake the Senate, but how realistic is that goal? NPR's A Martinez speaks with Kyle Kondik {KAHN-dik} of the University of Virginia Center for Politics.

title: A high-stakes U.S. Senate Race in Texas is expected to be a bitter contest
description: A U.S. Senate race in Texas is now set with the state's Attorney General Ken Paxton winning the GOP nomination in a primary runoff Tuesday. He'll face Democratic Senate candidate James Talarico.

title: Democrats look to rural voters to grow their coalition
description: Democrats are looking for a path to winning more Congressional seats in the future. One way may be to court more rural voters.

title: In a purple California district, Democrats vie for a chance to flip a House seat
description: Next week's primary in California includes a closely watched race between two Democrats in the state's Central Valley competing to unseat GOP Rep. David Valadao.

title: Trump is liberating his Republican critics in Congress
description: President Donald Trump, by endorsing challengers of Republican incumbents, is creating lame-duck senators who owe him nothing.

title: Why Texas suddenly has such a competitive Senate race
description: Ken Paxton makes a win possible for Democrats.

title: Former Obama adviser reflects on the 'Battle for American Identity'
description: Ben Rhodes was a speechwriter and security adviser for President Obama. His book, All We Say, is a collection of 15 speeches — from Ben Franklin to Trump — about what it means to be American.

title: Paxton crushes Cornyn in Senate primary in a big win for MAGA
description: John Cornyn became the second Republican senator to lose his seat in less than two weeks. A Trump endorsement helped propel Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton to a more than 25-point victory.

title: Why some Republicans are worried about Ken Paxton as a Senate nominee
description: Few politicians have garnered as much scandal in Texas as Paxton, but he has ignited the MAGA base, who see him as a fighter.

title: Did Trump pick the right blue for the Reflecting Pool? We asked a pool guy.
description: Old Glory Blue? American Flag Blue? Let's reflect on all the shades, while a federal judge mulls "aesthetic injury" in Trump's latest decorating flourish.

title: Texas Democrats reject House candidate who called for imprisoning Zionists
description: The runoff was a test of whether the Democratic Party could successfully distance itself from a left-wing candidate whom leaders called antisemitic.

title: The many hang-ups to a peace deal with Iran
description: Iran’s nuclear program is a big one.

title: Tracking who Trump is appointing to fill key administration roles
description: Follow President Trump’s progress filling over 800 positions, among about 1,300 that require Senate confirmation, in this tracker from The Washington Post and the Partnership for Public Service.

title: To repair ties with India, Rubio leans into pageantry
description: The top U.S. diplomat visited the world’s largest democracy in a bid to reverse soured relations over Trump’s tariff agenda and embrace of Pakistan.
